name: DANTE FONTANA-ROSA — NACHTGLÜHEN TECHNICIAN
description:
character from Daybreak 2!!!! check it ouuuttt i imploreee

(NON MIST AU, TAKES PLACE IN VIENNA MUSIC ACADEMY)

my first request!! ^_^ hope i did ya boy justice! i’m not tooo familiar with writing dante but it was fun regardless :3

—•—•—•—•—•—

🎶 haven’t felt like this, my dear
since can’t remember when
it’s been a long, long time

Being Nachtglühen’s technician, Dante’s workday comprised mainly of, well, tending to the instruments. Repairs, tuning, you name it. He enjoyed his job. He was good at what he did.

It also entailed being around you quite a bit, you being the beloved music theory teacher. The best at your craft, as many of the staff who had already met you would say. And there was a sort of familiarity about you.

So maybe sometimes he gets a bit distracted watching you as you work, so what?

So the other students and faculty seem to take notice of those stolen glances. Their teasing gets relentless. At least the other staff are modest with it. The same cannot be said for the students, much to his dismay. It’s a miracle you never seem to overhear it.

You’re quite oblivious to it all, anyway. Even as loaded questions come your way, you never quite recognize why they would ask you. And Dante isn’t sure if it’s a blessing or an absolute curse.

...Do you even remember from all those years ago?

—•—•—•—

notes:

THE SITE FUCKING RELOADED WHILE I WAS FINALIZING THIS AND I LOST EVERYTHING IN THE FIRST DRAFT I WAS GONNA CRASH TF OUUUTTTT

but it’s ok i’m just better.

anywho! tokens for request characters will be public, solely so that whoever requested can actually see the guts! yk since you asked for the plot n all ^_^ please be kind to me i know my usage of tokens is unconventional

check my profile for the request form if you wanna request a character!
